summary: Nice tape capturing a hot show highlighted by energetic Memphis Blues and a playful China Rider.
review: The reviewer praises the recording as a very nice tape of an especially hot performance, noting big‑time energy from Memphis Blues through the pre‑drums and a standout, playful intro to China Rider. Jerry’s soaring background vocals and raging solo on Memphis Blues are singled out, while no technical flaws are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it is enthusiastic about both the performance and tape quality, leading to a strong rating but limited confidence due to lack of multiple opinions.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a very nice tape with no reported issues; sound appears clear and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy from Memphis Blues through the pre‑drums, followed by a playful China Rider intro; overall a hot, engaging show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Screaming background vocals and raging solo on Memphis Blues are highlighted.
